adobe.accomplishment: Adobe is known for flagship creative tools including Photoshop, Illustrator, and Acrobat, and it invented the PDF and PostScript standards.
adobe.blurb: Adobe builds creative, document, and digital-experience software for designers, businesses, and everyday users.

affirm.accomplishment: Affirm is a leading point-of-sale installment lender, partnering with major retailers like Amazon, Walmart, and Shopify and pledging no hidden or late fees.
affirm.blurb: Affirm provides buy-now-pay-later financing that lets shoppers split purchases into installment payments at checkout.

airbnb.accomplishment: Airbnb pioneered the home-sharing economy, building a global platform spanning millions of listings across virtually every country.
airbnb.blurb: Airbnb operates an online marketplace connecting travelers with hosts offering short-term lodging and local experiences.

airtable.accomplishment: Airtable popularized the no-code database, enabling non-technical teams to create relational apps and workflows without writing code.
airtable.blurb: Airtable offers a cloud collaboration platform that blends spreadsheet simplicity with database power for building custom apps.

akunacapital.accomplishment: Akuna Capital is a leading options market maker that trades exclusively with its own capital and builds its own low-latency technology and quantitative models.
akunacapital.blurb: Akuna Capital is a proprietary trading firm specializing in options market making across global exchanges.

andurilindustries.accomplishment: Anduril is known for its Lattice AI platform and autonomous systems, pioneering a software-first, commercially funded model for defense products.
andurilindustries.blurb: Anduril builds autonomous defense technology, integrating hardware and AI software for military and national-security applications.

anthropic.accomplishment: Anthropic is the creator of the Claude family of AI models and is recognized for its focus on AI safety and interpretability research.
anthropic.blurb: Anthropic is an AI safety company that develops large language models and AI systems, including the Claude assistant.

apex-technology-inc.accomplishment: Apex is known for its Aries satellite bus platform, applying high-rate manufacturing to mass-produce spacecraft buses for low Earth and geostationary orbits.
apex-technology-inc.blurb: Apex manufactures standardized, productized satellite buses at scale for commercial, civil, and defense space missions.

apple.accomplishment: Apple is renowned for the iPhone, one of the best-selling product lines in history, and ranks among the most valuable companies in the world.
apple.blurb: Apple designs and sells consumer hardware, software, and services, including the iPhone, Mac, iPad, Apple Watch, and AirPods.

appliedintuition.accomplishment: Its toolchain for testing and deploying autonomous systems is used across automotive, trucking, construction, mining, agriculture, and defense by leading automakers worldwide.
appliedintuition.blurb: Applied Intuition builds simulation, validation, and autonomy software that helps automakers and defense customers develop self-driving and intelligent vehicle systems.

astranis.accomplishment: It is known for its MicroGEO satellite class: compact geostationary spacecraft providing dedicated internet capacity at a fraction of the size and cost of traditional GEO satellites.
astranis.blurb: Astranis designs and manufactures small, software-defined geostationary communications satellites that deliver dedicated broadband connectivity to specific regions and customers.

base-power.accomplishment: It builds a distributed network of residential battery storage that provides homes with backup power while helping balance the electric grid.
base-power.blurb: Base Power Company is an electricity provider that installs home battery systems and supplies grid power, pairing backup energy with low-cost service.

baseten.accomplishment: Its inference stack delivers high-performance, cost-efficient serving for large language models, embeddings, transcription, and other AI workloads at production scale.
baseten.blurb: Baseten provides a machine learning inference platform for deploying, serving, and scaling AI models in production.

belvederetrading.accomplishment: A Chicago-based options market maker, it provides liquidity across equity indices, single stocks, energies, grains, interest rates, metals, and softs through proprietary in-house trading systems.
belvederetrading.blurb: Belvedere Trading is a proprietary trading firm and market maker that provides liquidity across global derivatives markets using its own technology.

block.accomplishment: It is the parent of Square and Cash App, pioneering mobile card payments for small businesses and operating one of the most widely used consumer money apps.
block.blurb: Block is a financial technology company that builds payment, banking, and commerce tools for merchants and consumers.

blueorigin.accomplishment: It flies private passengers to the edge of space aboard its reusable New Shepard rocket and reaches orbit with its heavy-lift New Glenn launch vehicle.
blueorigin.blurb: Blue Origin is an aerospace company that develops reusable rockets, spacecraft, and engines to enable commercial human spaceflight and access to orbit.

braintrust.accomplishment: Its evaluation and observability tooling helps companies ship reliable AI features, with adoption by teams such as Notion, Stripe, Vercel, and Perplexity.
braintrust.blurb: Braintrust is an AI evaluation and observability platform that helps teams test, monitor, and improve LLM-powered applications.

brex.accomplishment: Brex is a financial technology platform for company spend, integrating corporate cards with expense management and controls for startups and enterprises.
brex.blurb: Brex provides corporate credit cards, expense management, and spend software built for startups and growing businesses.

browserbase.accomplishment: Browserbase offers serverless headless browsers with stealth, proxy, and session-control capabilities for deploying browser-based AI agents.
browserbase.blurb: Browserbase provides cloud-hosted headless browser infrastructure for running web automation and AI agents at scale.

capitalone.accomplishment: Capital One is a major U.S. bank and one of the country's largest credit card issuers.
capitalone.blurb: Capital One is a diversified bank offering credit cards, consumer and commercial banking, and auto loans.

chalk.accomplishment: Chalk provides a data-source-agnostic feature store delivering low-latency feature computation with time-travel for training, batch scoring, and real-time inference.
chalk.blurb: Chalk offers a real-time data and feature platform for building and serving production machine learning and AI inference.

clear.accomplishment: CLEAR pioneered tokenless biometric screening and operates expedited identity lanes across many U.S. airports and sports venues.
clear.blurb: CLEAR (Clear Secure) operates a biometric identity verification platform used at airports, stadiums, and other venues.

clickup.accomplishment: ClickUp consolidates tasks, documents, goals, and chat into a single workspace marketed as an app to replace many separate work tools.
clickup.blurb: ClickUp offers an all-in-one productivity platform combining project management, tasks, docs, and collaboration tools.

cloudflare.accomplishment: Cloudflare operates one of the world's largest networks, protecting and accelerating a substantial share of internet websites and applications.
cloudflare.blurb: Cloudflare provides a global content delivery network, web security, and edge computing services.

cognition.accomplishment: Cognition created Devin, an autonomous AI software engineer that can plan, write, test, and ship code.
cognition.blurb: Cognition builds autonomous AI software engineering agents, best known for its AI software engineer Devin.

cohere.accomplishment: Cohere is known for its Command, Embed, and Rerank model family, offering enterprise LLMs optimized for retrieval, multilingual search, and regulated industries.
cohere.blurb: Cohere builds enterprise-grade large language models and AI tools designed for secure, private deployment inside business and regulated-industry infrastructure.

crunchyroll.accomplishment: Crunchyroll is the world's leading anime streaming brand, distributing a vast licensed catalog of simulcast and dubbed series to subscribers across the globe.
crunchyroll.blurb: Crunchyroll operates a subscription streaming service dedicated to anime, manga, and East Asian entertainment for a global audience.

ctc.accomplishment: CTC is a premier derivatives market maker, providing liquidity across equity index, interest rate, and commodity products on major options exchanges.
ctc.blurb: Chicago Trading Company (CTC) is a proprietary trading firm specializing in options and derivatives market making across global exchanges.

cursor.accomplishment: Cursor is one of the most widely adopted AI coding tools, used by developers and businesses worldwide to write, refactor, and debug software.
cursor.blurb: Anysphere develops Cursor, an AI-first code editor that integrates code generation, understanding, and multi-file editing into the development workflow.

databricks.accomplishment: Databricks pioneered the data lakehouse and was founded by the original creators of Apache Spark, MLflow, and Delta Lake.
databricks.blurb: Databricks provides a unified data and AI platform built around the lakehouse architecture for analytics, data engineering, and machine learning.

datadog.accomplishment: Datadog is a leading observability platform, unifying metrics, traces, and logs so engineering teams can monitor cloud-scale systems in one place.
datadog.blurb: Datadog offers a cloud-based observability and security platform that monitors infrastructure, applications, logs, and user experience.

decagon.accomplishment: Decagon is known for its AI concierge platform, deploying conversational agents that resolve customer inquiries and execute tasks like refunds and cancellations.
decagon.blurb: Decagon builds enterprise AI agents that autonomously handle customer support across chat, email, and voice channels.

discord.accomplishment: Discord is a leading communication platform for online communities, hosting millions of servers where people gather over shared interests in real time.
discord.blurb: Discord operates a voice, video, and text communication platform organized around community servers for gamers and interest-based groups.

disney.accomplishment: Disney is one of the world's largest media and entertainment conglomerates, home to iconic brands including Pixar, Marvel, Star Wars, ESPN, and its theme park resorts.
disney.blurb: Disney is a diversified global entertainment company spanning film and television studios, streaming, theme parks, and consumer products.

distyl.accomplishment: Distyl forward-deploys engineers and researchers to deliver production AI systems for Fortune 100 leaders across healthcare, telecommunications, CPG, retail, and manufacturing.
distyl.blurb: Distyl is an enterprise generative AI firm that builds and deploys custom AI systems and applications for large organizations.

doordashusa.accomplishment: DoorDash is the leading food-delivery marketplace in the United States, connecting consumers with merchants through a network of independent couriers.
doordashusa.blurb: DoorDash operates an on-demand local commerce platform connecting customers with restaurants and merchants through delivery and pickup.

dropbox.accomplishment: Dropbox pioneered seamless cloud file syncing and serves users worldwide as a foundational cloud-storage platform.
dropbox.blurb: Dropbox provides cloud-based file storage, syncing, sharing, and collaboration tools for individuals and teams.

drw.accomplishment: DRW is one of the world's largest principal trading firms, making markets across fixed income, options, derivatives, commodities, equities, FX, and crypto from offices on multiple continents.
drw.blurb: DRW is a proprietary trading firm that trades its own capital across global markets using technology-driven, quantitative strategies.

elevenlabs.accomplishment: ElevenLabs is a leading voice AI platform, known for highly realistic text-to-speech and voice cloning that generates lifelike speech across dozens of languages.
elevenlabs.blurb: ElevenLabs is an AI audio research and deployment company building voice generation, text-to-speech, dubbing, and conversational AI tools.

eliseai.accomplishment: EliseAI is a leading AI platform for the housing industry, automating phone, text, email, and chat interactions around the clock across leasing and resident services.
eliseai.blurb: EliseAI builds conversational AI assistants and CRM software that automate leasing, resident communication, and operations for property management and housing.

exa.accomplishment: Exa operates its own independently built web index and neural search models, providing embeddings-based semantic search, crawling, and retrieval infrastructure for AI applications.
exa.blurb: Exa builds a web search API and AI search engine that uses neural embeddings to retrieve content for AI agents and applications.

expedia.accomplishment: Expedia is one of the world's largest online travel companies, anchoring a brand family that includes Hotels.com, Vrbo, and Orbitz.
expedia.blurb: Expedia operates online travel booking platforms where travelers compare and reserve flights, hotels, car rentals, and vacation packages.

fal.accomplishment: fal operates a generative media platform serving developers and companies through a unified API with proprietary inference optimizations.
fal.blurb: fal runs a generative media inference platform giving developers fast API access to AI image, video, audio, and 3D models.

figma.accomplishment: Figma pioneered real-time multiplayer design in the browser and is a standard collaborative tool for product designers and teams worldwide.
figma.blurb: Figma makes a browser-based collaborative design platform for interface design, prototyping, and real-time multiplayer product work.

figureai.accomplishment: Figure AI develops autonomous humanoid robots powered by its own AI for commercial use in manufacturing, logistics, and other workplaces.
figureai.blurb: Figure AI builds general-purpose humanoid robots designed to perform physical labor across manufacturing, logistics, and other workplaces.

fireworksai.accomplishment: Fireworks AI provides highly optimized, low-latency inference that lets developers deploy large language and multimodal models at production scale.
fireworksai.blurb: Fireworks AI provides a fast inference platform for running, fine-tuning, and serving open-source and custom generative AI models in production.

flint.accomplishment: Flint provides schools with an AI tutor and teaching tools that deliver personalized, standards-aligned instruction across subjects.
flint.blurb: Flint offers an AI tutoring and personalized-learning platform built for K-12 schools, serving both students and teachers.

flowengineering.accomplishment: Flow Engineering's platform modernizes hardware design for aerospace, robotics, automotive, and nuclear teams, enabling live requirements traceability and AI-assisted engineering.
flowengineering.blurb: Flow Engineering builds a collaborative systems-engineering platform that unifies requirements and engineering models for hardware development teams.

gem.accomplishment: Gem is a talent engagement and recruiting CRM that recruiting teams use to build and manage hiring pipelines.
gem.blurb: Gem provides an AI-powered recruiting platform combining candidate relationship management, sourcing, analytics, and applicant tracking for hiring teams.

generalintelligencecompany.accomplishment: Its flagship product, Cofounder, gives business owners a staff of AI agents that handle day-to-day work, advancing a mission to make every business agent-native.
generalintelligencecompany.blurb: The General Intelligence Company is an applied AI lab building autonomous agents that run end-to-end business operations from natural-language instructions.

gigaml.accomplishment: It deploys AI support agents for large consumer brands such as DoorDash and meets SOC 2, GDPR, ISO 27001, and HIPAA compliance standards.
gigaml.blurb: GigaML builds enterprise AI voice and chat agents that resolve customer-support issues at scale with human-like conversations.

gitlab.accomplishment: It is one of the world's largest all-remote companies and provides a single application used by enterprises and open-source developers worldwide.
gitlab.blurb: GitLab is a DevSecOps platform unifying source control, CI/CD, security, and project planning across the software development lifecycle.

gleanwork.accomplishment: Its trusted-knowledge model connects many enterprise data sources while enforcing user permissions, grounding AI answers in each organization's secured content.
gleanwork.blurb: Glean is an enterprise Work AI platform that unifies search, assistants, and agents across a company's apps and data.

gm.accomplishment: It is one of the largest American automakers, pursuing an all-electric future built on its Ultium battery platform across a global vehicle lineup.
gm.blurb: General Motors designs, manufactures, and sells vehicles and parts under brands including Chevrolet, GMC, Buick, and Cadillac.

google.accomplishment: Google operates the world's most-used search engine and the Android mobile operating system, which together reach billions of users globally.
google.blurb: Google builds internet products and services, including its dominant search engine, online advertising, the Android operating system, and cloud computing.

granola.accomplishment: It blends a user's own notes with AI-generated detail into shareable summaries and is widely adopted by founders, investors, and recruiters.
granola.blurb: Granola is an AI notepad that transcribes and summarizes meetings by capturing device audio without joining calls as a bot.

happyrobot.ai.accomplishment: Its AI workers integrate with transportation management systems and load boards to handle carrier sales and check calls for major logistics and freight firms.
happyrobot.ai.blurb: Happyrobot builds voice AI agents that automate inbound and outbound phone calls, emails, and texts for the logistics and freight industry.

harvey.accomplishment: Its AI platform serves law firms and in-house legal teams worldwide, counting much of the Am Law 100 among its customers.
harvey.blurb: Harvey builds domain-specific AI for legal and professional services, automating contract analysis, due diligence, compliance, and litigation work.

hightouch.accomplishment: It pioneered the Reverse ETL category and the Composable CDP, letting companies activate customer data directly from their warehouse without copying it into a separate system.
hightouch.blurb: Hightouch is a data activation platform that syncs warehouse data into the marketing, sales, and advertising tools teams use.

hrt.accomplishment: It is one of the largest market makers in US equities and serves as a designated market maker on the New York Stock Exchange.
hrt.blurb: Hudson River Trading is a quantitative trading firm that uses algorithms and research to provide liquidity across global financial markets.

imc.accomplishment: Founded by Amsterdam options traders, it makes markets in securities across exchanges worldwide and is a designated market maker on the New York Stock Exchange.
imc.blurb: IMC Trading is a technology-driven global market maker and proprietary trading firm that provides liquidity across financial markets.

instacart.accomplishment: It is North America's largest online grocery platform, partnering with retailers to fulfill orders from their stores across the continent.
instacart.blurb: Instacart is an online grocery marketplace connecting shoppers with delivery and pickup from local and national retailers.

judgmentlabs.accomplishment: It created Judgeval, an open-source library for tracing, scoring, and monitoring agent behavior to surface failure patterns in production AI workflows.
judgmentlabs.blurb: Judgment Labs builds evaluation and monitoring tools that help teams measure, debug, and continuously improve AI agents.

jumptrading.accomplishment: Founded by former Chicago pit traders, it trades equities, futures, options, and digital assets worldwide and built a major presence in cryptocurrency through Jump Crypto.
jumptrading.blurb: Jump Trading is a research-driven proprietary trading firm specializing in algorithmic and high-frequency trading across global markets.

krea.accomplishment: It is known for a real-time canvas that renders generated imagery as users type or draw, plus custom-model training and its own Krea image models.
krea.blurb: Krea is a generative AI creative suite for producing and editing images, video, and 3D from text prompts.

langchain.accomplishment: Its LangChain framework is among the most widely adopted open-source toolkits for LLM apps, complemented by LangGraph for agent orchestration and LangSmith for observability.
langchain.blurb: LangChain builds open-source frameworks and tools for developing applications and agents powered by large language models.

light.accomplishment: Light is recognized for pioneering an AI-powered general ledger designed to unify and automate financial operations across multiple countries and currencies.
light.blurb: Light builds an AI-native general ledger and ERP platform that automates accounting, tax, payments, and reporting for global multinational companies.

linear.accomplishment: Linear is known for setting a benchmark in developer tooling speed and design, becoming a widely adopted alternative to legacy trackers like Jira.
linear.blurb: Linear makes a fast, keyboard-driven issue tracking and project management tool purpose-built for software product and engineering teams.

lyft.accomplishment: Lyft is one of the largest ridesharing platforms in North America and a primary competitor to Uber in the on-demand mobility market.
lyft.blurb: Lyft operates a ridesharing marketplace connecting passengers with drivers through its mobile app across North America.

merge.accomplishment: Merge is one of the most widely adopted unified API platforms, letting B2B software teams ship many third-party integrations through one normalized interface.
merge.blurb: Merge provides a single unified API that lets software products add hundreds of integrations across HR, payroll, accounting, CRM, and ticketing.

microsoft.accomplishment: Microsoft's Windows is among the most widely used desktop operating systems in the world, and its Azure platform is a leading cloud computing service.
microsoft.blurb: Microsoft develops software, cloud services, and devices, including the Windows operating system, Office productivity suite, and Azure cloud platform.

mintlify.accomplishment: Mintlify powers documentation for leading developer companies and is known for automatically keeping docs in sync with a product's codebase.
mintlify.blurb: Mintlify offers an AI-native documentation platform that helps developer teams build polished docs sites with interactive API playgrounds and smart search.

modal.accomplishment: Modal is known for serverless GPU and CPU infrastructure that lets AI and data teams run code at scale without managing underlying servers.
modal.blurb: Modal Labs runs a serverless cloud platform that lets developers deploy and scale compute-intensive AI, machine learning, and data workloads in Python.

mongodb.accomplishment: MongoDB is the world's most popular document database, with its fully managed Atlas service offered across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.
mongodb.blurb: MongoDB develops a document-oriented NoSQL database and a multi-cloud data platform for building and scaling modern applications.

netflix.accomplishment: Netflix is one of the world's largest streaming entertainment services, pioneering on-demand streaming and large-scale original content production worldwide.
netflix.blurb: Netflix operates a global subscription streaming service offering films, series, and other content, and produces its own original programming.

neuralink.accomplishment: Neuralink is known for surgically implanting a wireless brain chip that lets paralyzed people control digital devices using only their thoughts.
neuralink.blurb: Neuralink develops implantable brain-computer interface devices that connect the human brain directly to computers.

nominal.accomplishment: Nominal is known for modernizing how engineers test complex physical and defense systems with software-driven hardware test and observability tooling.
nominal.blurb: Nominal builds a unified data platform for capturing, analyzing, and monitoring hardware test data across aerospace, defense, and heavy industry.

notion.accomplishment: Notion is known for pioneering the flexible block-based workspace, with a vast community of template and integration builders.
notion.blurb: Notion offers an all-in-one workspace combining notes, documents, databases, wikis, and project management for individuals and teams.

nuro.accomplishment: Nuro was the first company to receive an autonomous vehicle exemption from the U.S. NHTSA for a purpose-built driverless delivery vehicle.
nuro.blurb: Nuro develops AI-first autonomous driving technology, originally for custom self-driving local delivery vehicles.

nvidia.accomplishment: NVIDIA invented the GPU and its CUDA platform powers the majority of the world's AI training and high-performance computing workloads.
nvidia.blurb: NVIDIA designs graphics processing units and accelerated computing platforms for gaming, data centers, and artificial intelligence.

openai.accomplishment: OpenAI created ChatGPT and the GPT family of models, defining the modern generative AI era with one of the fastest-growing consumer applications ever.
openai.blurb: OpenAI is an artificial intelligence research and deployment company building large language models and AI products.

optiver.accomplishment: Optiver is one of the world's leading market makers, trading and quoting prices across exchanges around the globe.
optiver.blurb: Optiver is a proprietary trading firm and global market maker providing liquidity across equities, options, futures, and other asset classes.

palantir.accomplishment: Palantir is known for its Gotham and Foundry platforms, widely used across government, defense, and enterprise for intelligence and operational analytics.
palantir.blurb: Palantir builds data integration and analytics software platforms that help organizations make decisions from large, complex datasets.

pallet.accomplishment: Pallet is known for its all-in-one logistics operating system that automates back-office freight workflows like order entry, dispatch, billing, and shipment tracking with AI agents.
pallet.blurb: Pallet builds AI-powered logistics software, including transportation and warehouse management systems, for fleets, freight brokers, and third-party logistics providers.

paraform.accomplishment: Paraform is known for its marketplace of vetted independent recruiters who fill roles on a pay-for-success basis, offering an alternative to in-house and agency hiring.
paraform.blurb: Paraform operates a recruiting marketplace that connects companies with independent professional recruiters to fill open roles on a success-based fee model.

paypal.accomplishment: PayPal is one of the world's most widely used digital payment networks and owns the Venmo and Braintree payment brands.
paypal.blurb: PayPal operates a global online payments platform that lets consumers and businesses send, receive, and manage money digitally.

perplexity.accomplishment: Perplexity is recognized as a leading AI search platform that pioneered citation-backed conversational answers as an alternative to traditional search engines.
perplexity.blurb: Perplexity runs an AI-powered answer engine that responds to questions with direct, conversational answers backed by cited web sources.

pinterest.accomplishment: Pinterest is a leading visual discovery engine where people browse and save ideas, known as Pins, for inspiration and planning.
pinterest.blurb: Pinterest operates a visual discovery platform where users find, save, and organize images and ideas for projects and inspiration.

plaid.accomplishment: Plaid is core financial infrastructure, providing the connectivity that lets fintech apps and banks securely link to users' bank accounts and financial data.
plaid.blurb: Plaid provides a fintech data network and APIs that let applications securely connect to users' bank accounts and financial data.

poke.accomplishment: Poke is known for making AI agents as accessible as sending a text, proactively handling email, calendar, and everyday tasks via iMessage and SMS.
poke.blurb: Poke, by The Interaction Company of California, is an AI personal assistant that operates through text messaging to manage tasks on a user's behalf.

posthog.accomplishment: PostHog is known as a leading open-source, all-in-one product analytics suite that developers can self-host with full access to their own data.
posthog.blurb: PostHog provides an open-source product analytics platform combining event tracking, session replay, feature flags, experimentation, and more for developers.

pylon-labs.accomplishment: Pylon serves fast-growing software companies as a modern alternative to legacy help desks, consolidating omnichannel B2B support into a single inbox.
pylon-labs.blurb: Pylon is an AI-native customer support platform for B2B companies, unifying ticketing, chat, knowledge base, and account intelligence across Slack and Microsoft Teams.

ramp.accomplishment: Ramp is known for pairing corporate cards with automated finance software designed to actively cut company spending rather than encourage it.
ramp.blurb: Ramp provides corporate cards and a spend-management platform that helps businesses automate expenses, payments, accounting, and procurement.

reddit.accomplishment: Reddit hosts hundreds of thousands of interest-based communities, billing itself as the front page of the internet and ranking among the world's most-visited sites.
reddit.blurb: Reddit operates a social platform of community forums called subreddits where users post, vote on, and discuss content across nearly every topic.

reducto.accomplishment: Reducto combines computer vision with vision-language models to parse documents at scale, outperforming major cloud document APIs on accuracy benchmarks.
reducto.blurb: Reducto builds a document-parsing and ingestion API that turns complex PDFs, spreadsheets, and slides into structured data for AI systems.

resolve-ai.accomplishment: Founded by co-creators of OpenTelemetry, Resolve AI is deployed in production at major technology, financial, and consumer companies to reduce incident resolution time, and ranked #1 on Harmonic's Hot 25 Startups list for Q3 2026.
resolve-ai.blurb: Resolve AI builds an agentic AI production engineer that autonomously investigates and resolves software incidents and SRE workflows.

retool.accomplishment: Retool is widely adopted across enterprises and startups as a standard way to build internal software faster than coding apps from scratch.
retool.blurb: Retool is a development platform for quickly building internal tools, dashboards, and business apps from prebuilt UI components and existing data sources.

roadrunner.accomplishment: Backed by Kleiner Perkins and led by repeat founders, Roadrunner aims to replace legacy quoting tools with an AI-driven pricing model for enterprise sales.
roadrunner.blurb: Roadrunner builds AI-native CPQ (configure, price, quote) software with an agentic Prompt, Quote, Approve stack for enterprise sales pricing and deal approvals.

robinhood.accomplishment: Robinhood is credited with popularizing commission-free trading and helping bring a new generation of retail investors into the financial markets.
robinhood.blurb: Robinhood operates a mobile-first investing app offering commission-free trading of stocks, options, ETFs, and cryptocurrencies.

roblox.accomplishment: Roblox is one of the world's largest user-generated gaming platforms, where creators build experiences with its Studio tools and earn money via its Robux currency.
roblox.blurb: Roblox operates an online platform and marketplace where users play, create, and share immersive 3D games and experiences built by a global community.

salient.accomplishment: Salient ranked #2 on Harmonic's Hot 25 Startups list for Q3 2026 and is backed by a16z and Y Combinator with a $65M Series A.
salient.blurb: Salient builds AI-native infrastructure for consumer lending and loan servicing, automating financial-operations workflows for lenders.

saronic.accomplishment: Saronic produces a family of autonomous naval surface vessels for the U.S. military, designed to operate unmanned for missions including surveillance and at-sea rescue.
saronic.blurb: Saronic designs and builds autonomous surface vessels and the software that lets them operate unmanned for defense and maritime missions.

scaleai.accomplishment: Scale AI is a leading provider of the labeled data and evaluation tooling behind modern AI, serving automotive, enterprise, and U.S. government and defense customers.
scaleai.blurb: Scale AI provides data labeling, annotation, and evaluation infrastructure that supplies high-quality training and test data for machine learning models.

sentry.accomplishment: Sentry is a widely adopted error-tracking and performance-monitoring platform, rooted in open source and supporting dozens of programming languages and frameworks.
sentry.blurb: Sentry makes application monitoring software that helps developers detect, diagnose, and fix errors and performance issues across web, mobile, and backend apps.

sesame.accomplishment: Founded by Oculus co-founder Brendan Iribe, Sesame created a Conversational Speech Model that produces emotionally expressive, natural-sounding voice assistants.
sesame.blurb: Sesame builds lifelike conversational voice AI companions and lightweight wearable glasses designed to access them throughout the day.

sierra.accomplishment: Co-founded by former Salesforce co-CEO Bret Taylor and ex-Google Labs lead Clay Bavor, Sierra powers customer-facing AI agents for major enterprise brands.
sierra.blurb: Sierra builds a platform that lets businesses create branded conversational AI agents for customer service, sales, and operations across chat, voice, and messaging.

siftstack.accomplishment: Sift offers an observability stack purpose-built for mission-critical hardware, serving aerospace, defense, and robotics teams working with high-cardinality sensor data.
siftstack.blurb: Sift builds an observability platform that ingests, stores, and analyzes hardware sensor telemetry at scale for engineering teams.

slack.accomplishment: Slack is a leading team-collaboration platform known for popularizing channel-based workplace messaging, and is part of Salesforce.
slack.blurb: Slack provides a cloud-based messaging platform that organizes team communication into channels and integrates with workplace tools and apps.

snap.accomplishment: Snap pioneered ephemeral messaging and augmented-reality lenses through Snapchat, a camera app used by hundreds of millions of people daily.
snap.blurb: Snap is a camera and social media company whose flagship app, Snapchat, lets people share disappearing photos and videos.

snowflake.accomplishment: Snowflake popularized the cloud data warehouse by separating storage from compute, enabling elastic, cross-cloud analytics and secure data sharing at scale.
snowflake.blurb: Snowflake provides a cloud-based data platform for storing, querying, and sharing large-scale data and AI workloads across providers.

spacex.accomplishment: SpaceX is the first private company to develop reusable orbital rockets and to send astronauts to the International Space Station.
spacex.blurb: SpaceX designs, manufactures, and launches rockets and spacecraft, providing launch services and satellite internet to advance access to space.

spotify.accomplishment: Spotify is the world's largest music streaming service, known for personalized recommendations and discovery features like its annual Wrapped recap.
spotify.blurb: Spotify operates an audio streaming platform offering music, podcasts, and audiobooks to listeners and a distribution channel for creators.

squarespace.accomplishment: Squarespace is known for its design-forward, template-driven website builder that lets individuals and small businesses launch professional sites without coding.
squarespace.blurb: Squarespace offers an all-in-one platform for building websites, online stores, and managing domains, scheduling, and digital marketing.

stripe.accomplishment: Stripe is a foundational internet payments platform whose developer-friendly APIs power online checkout for millions of businesses worldwide.
stripe.blurb: Stripe builds payments infrastructure and financial APIs that let businesses accept payments and manage commerce online.

sunday.accomplishment: Founded by Stanford roboticists behind influential robot-learning work, Sunday trains its Memo robot on millions of real household chore demonstrations.
sunday.blurb: Sunday Robotics builds AI-powered household robots, led by its home robot Memo that learns and performs everyday chores.

supabase.accomplishment: Supabase is widely known as the open-source alternative to Firebase, building its entire platform around the standard PostgreSQL database.
supabase.blurb: Supabase is an open-source backend-as-a-service that gives developers a hosted Postgres database with authentication, storage, realtime, and auto-generated APIs.

thinkingmachines.accomplishment: Thinking Machines pursues a mission of building collaborative, customizable general intelligence and offers Tinker, an API for fine-tuning open-weight language models.
thinkingmachines.blurb: Thinking Machines is an artificial intelligence research and product lab founded by former OpenAI chief technology officer Mira Murati.

togetherai.accomplishment: Together AI is recognized for fast, cost-efficient inference and for advancing open research like the FlashAttention and RedPajama open-dataset projects.
togetherai.blurb: Together AI operates a cloud platform for running, fine-tuning, and training open-source generative AI models on high-performance GPU infrastructure.

trajectory.accomplishment: Trajectory partners with AI-native companies to continuously post-train their models in production, turning live usage signals into ongoing model improvements.
trajectory.blurb: Trajectory builds a continual-learning platform that post-trains large-scale agentic AI models on real product-usage signals so they improve over time.

traversal.accomplishment: Traversal applies causal machine learning to identify the true root cause of production incidents in minutes, serving large enterprises like American Express.
traversal.blurb: Traversal builds an AI site reliability engineer that autonomously triages production incidents and pinpoints their root cause across complex systems.

turo.accomplishment: Turo is one of the world's largest car-sharing marketplaces, connecting guests with a wide selection of host-owned vehicles across many countries.
turo.blurb: Turo runs a peer-to-peer car-sharing marketplace where private vehicle owners rent their cars to travelers and other guests.

twilio.accomplishment: Twilio is a foundational customer-engagement platform whose programmable APIs power SMS, phone, and authentication flows for a vast range of companies.
twilio.blurb: Twilio provides cloud communications APIs that let developers embed messaging, voice, email, and video into their applications.

twitch.accomplishment: Twitch is the world's leading live-streaming service for gamers and a flagship part of Amazon, pioneering interactive features like Bits and channel subscriptions.
twitch.blurb: Twitch operates a live-streaming platform centered on gaming, esports, music, and creator content with real-time interactive chat.

unity3d.accomplishment: Unity is one of the world's most widely used game engines, powering a large share of mobile and indie games.
unity3d.blurb: Unity builds a cross-platform real-time 3D engine and toolset for creating and operating games and interactive content.

vercel.accomplishment: Vercel created and maintains Next.js, one of the most popular React frameworks for building web applications.
vercel.blurb: Vercel operates a frontend cloud platform for deploying, scaling, and hosting modern web applications.

vizcom.accomplishment: Vizcom's sketch-to-render tools are used by industrial and automotive design teams to accelerate concept visualization.
vizcom.blurb: Vizcom makes an AI design platform that turns rough sketches into photorealistic, refinable product renders.

waymo.accomplishment: Waymo, an Alphabet subsidiary, operates a fully driverless public robotaxi service on U.S. city streets.
waymo.blurb: Waymo develops autonomous driving technology and operates a self-driving ride-hailing service.

wispr-flow.accomplishment: Wispr Flow delivers AI voice-to-text across desktop and mobile, automatically cleaning up spoken input into polished writing.
wispr-flow.blurb: Wispr Flow builds an AI voice dictation app that turns natural speech into clean, formatted text across any application.

workweave.accomplishment: Workweave gives engineering teams AI-driven visibility into productivity, impact, and collaboration across their development work.
workweave.blurb: Workweave (Weave) builds an AI agent that measures and improves how software engineering teams work and ship.

xai.accomplishment: xAI develops Grok, an AI assistant integrated with the X platform, and was founded by Elon Musk.
xai.blurb: xAI is an artificial intelligence company building advanced AI models and the Grok conversational assistant.

zoox.accomplishment: Zoox, an Amazon subsidiary, develops a bidirectional, steering-wheel-free vehicle engineered from the ground up for autonomous ride-hailing.
zoox.blurb: Zoox designs and operates purpose-built autonomous robotaxis for on-demand urban ride-hailing.
